channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Unpacking Netanyahu’s latest claims about the war on Iran
item.description: Benjamin Netanyahu claimed to have made significant progress in 20 days of war on Iran but indicated more is to come.

item.title: Trump must ‘take the steering wheel back from the Israelis’ in Iran war
item.description: Trita Parsi, argues that US President Trump must not allow Israel to control the war with Iran.

item.title: Palestinians bury four women killed in Iranian missile attack
item.description: A small occupied West Bank community has buried four women killed in a hair salon during an Iranian missile attack.

item.title: Videos show Iranian missile fragments impacting northern Israel
item.description: Videos published by local Israeli platforms show Iranian missile fragments making impact in northern Israel.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran warns of intensified strikes if energy sites targeted
item.description: Iran strikes Israeli oil refinery in northern city of Haifa as Tehran launches attacks on regional energy facilities.

item.title: Mexican military says 11 killed in raid targeting Sinaloa cartel leader
item.description: Omar Oswaldo Torres, the leader of the Los Mayos faction of the Sinaloa criminal network, was detained in the raid.

item.title: US intelligence chief admits US, Israel not aligned on Iran war goals
item.description: The US Director of National ‌Intelligence says American and Israeli goals in the war on Iran are not the same.

item.title: Netanyahu says Iran’s uranium enrichment abilities destroyed
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu claims Iran no longer has “the capacity to enrich uranium."

item.title: Israel continues Gaza attacks amid regional war, kills several Palestinians
item.description: Three killed in separate attacks in Gaza City as Rafah border reopens for limited medical evacuations.

item.title: Israelis protest in Tel Aviv calling for end to Iran war
item.description: Israelis protested in Tel Aviv demanding an end to the war with Iran and conflict with Hezbollah.
